metadata.claim_text: Board trap: oversimplifying periprosthetic joint infection without attending-level implant, fixation, or infection context.
PJI workup is a structured infection pathway where timing and aspiration data shape whether implants can be retained.
Present indication, relevant imaging, implant/fixation concepts, and escalation pathway for periprosthetic joint infection.

metadata.action: Discuss implant retention versus staged revision with attending using timeline classification
metadata.trigger: Suspected PJI with elevated inflammatory markers and positive aspiration

metadata.claim_text: Attending pearl: connect periprosthetic joint infection anatomy, implant interfaces, and shared trauma neighborhoods before operative planning.

metadata.description: Bacterial biofilm limiting antibiotic penetration on implant surfaces.
PMMA cement securing implant to bone for immediate stability.
Bony pelvic ring anchoring the acetabulum and hip center of rotation.
TKA tibial tray fixed to proximal tibia receiving polyethylene insert.
Acute postoperative, acute hematogenous, and chronic infection categories.
